name: US500_EMA_Pullback_M15
hypothesis: On US500 M15, pullbacks to EMA(20) within an EMA(20)>EMA(50) uptrend (or mirrored downtrend) during US cash hours produce mean-reverting-to-trend entries with favorable RR when ATR percentile is moderate.

entry_rules.long: ema20 > ema50 AND low <= ema20 AND close > ema20 AND rsi14 between 40 and 65
entry_rules.short: ema20 < ema50 AND high >= ema20 AND close < ema20 AND rsi14 between 35 and 60

diversification_notes: Trend-pullback family on US500; distinct from breakout and mean-reversion candidates.
